list.title: Pages
list.description: Edit runtime overrides for files under content/pages while keeping the MDX files as the default source of truth.
list.empty: No static pages found in content/pages.

edit.title: Edit Page Override
edit.description: The form starts from the current page content. Matching the MDX file value will automatically fall back to the file instead of storing a duplicate override.

cards.source_description: These values come from the checked-in MDX file.
cards.override_description: Only values different from the MDX file will be saved to the database.
